text: Inside this clean, modern hallway, I sense anticipation and a tinge of detachment—a corridor as a threshold between knowing and wondering. Through the glass, the vibrant exhibit beckons with the promise of ideas yet to be absorbed. My reflection is faint, but my consciousness is sharp. I move forward with curiosity, quietly aware of the reflective, almost clinical air. This place feels like an arena for thought and potential, its silence charged with possibility.
